chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH,CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 3150 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 03.11.2022 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Chanhio advocate of petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- Learned AAG has filed comment, which taken on record. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that he would be satisfied if the Deputy Commissioner Sanghar is directed to drain out flood water from Sanghar and the adjoining areas within a period of one month. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
